name: Roast Chicken II
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into serving pieces and wash and dry thoroughly.
2. Butter the roasting pan.
3. Arrange the potatoes around the outer edge of the pan; add the chicken, laying the pieces skin side down.
4. Sprinkle with salt, pepper, parsley, chopped garlic, raisins, Romano cheese, nuts, and basil.
5. Put dabs of butter on the chicken.
6. Sprinkle with vinegar.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees for 1 hour.
